title: Add telemetry for Content Security Policy
issue_text: This adds basic JEP-214 telemetry for Content Security Policy (introduced in Jenkins 2.539). Resolves https://github.com/jenkinsci/jenkins/issues/23900. ### Testing done Script console: `ExtensionList.lookupSingleton(jenkins.telemetry.impl.ContentSecurityPolicy).createContent()` Output: > `Result: {"enforce":false,"decider":"jenkins.security.csp.impl.DevelopmentHeaderDecider","header":"Content-Security-Policy","contributors":["io.jenkins.plugins.csp.ContentSecurityPolicyContributor","jenkins.security.csp.AvatarContributor","jenkins.security.csp.impl.BaseContributor","jenkins.security.csp.impl.CompatibleContributor","jenkins.security.csp.impl.UserAvatarContributor"],"configurations":["io.jenkins.plugins.csp.CustomRuleAdvancedConfiguration$DescriptorImpl","io.jenkins.plugins.csp.ReportingAdvancedConfiguration$DescriptorImpl"],"directivesSize":{"style-src":{"entries":3,"chars":38},"base-uri":{"entries":0,"chars":0},"script-src":{"entries":2,"chars":22},"form-action":{"entries":1,"chars":6},"frame-ancestors":{"entries":1,"chars":6},"img-src":{"entries":2,"chars":12},"default-src":{"entries":1,"chars":6}},"components":{"commons-lang3-api":"3.19.0-104.v12125f33a_255","csp":"2.57.va_b_326b_54f1ee","ionicons-api":"94.vcc3065403257","jenkins-core":"2.541-SNAPSHOT"}}` UI help (with wrong date to locally test): I also confirmed there are submissions to Uplink. ### Proposed changelog entries - Add telemetry for Content Security Policy enforcement. ### Proposed changelog category /label rfe
